source_text: leading zeros found in this octet string MUST NOT be truncated.
rule_statement: Leading zeros in the ECDH shared secret octet string MUST NOT be truncated.
applies_when: Computing ECDH shared secret for secp256r1/secp384r1/secp521r1
expected_value: shared secret maintains constant field element length with leading zeros
checkability_rationale: Can verify via test vectors but hard to observe in live traffic.

source_text: Implementations MUST check whether the computed Diffie-Hellman shared secret is the all-zero value and abort if so, as described in Section 6 of [RFC7748].
rule_statement: For X25519/X448, implementations MUST check for all-zero shared secret and abort if found.
applies_when: Computing ECDH shared secret for X25519 or X448
expected_value: abort connection if shared secret is all-zero
checkability_rationale: Can send low-order point to trigger all-zero check.
